project_type: Next.js 14 App Router with Tailwind CSS and Supabase
test_framework: Next.js build validation (no test runner specified)
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npm run build' to verify the project compiles without errors. 2. Check that all pages render correctly by inspecting the build output.
setup_instructions: 1. Remove existing static files (index.html, css/, js/, images/). 2. Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx create-next-app@latest . --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app --src-dir --import-alias @/* --use-npm' to scaffold. 3. Install supabase client: 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npm install @supabase/supabase-js'.
environment_constraints: NODE_OPTIONS env var must be unset before running npm/npx commands due to a preload script issue. Use 'unset NODE_OPTIONS &&' prefix for all npm/node commands.
contribution_requirements: Replace all existing static files with the new Next.js project. Commit to a new feature branch.
key_patterns: Next.js App Router with src/app directory structure. Tailwind CSS for styling. Supabase for database and storage. Pinterest-style masonry grid layout. Admin authentication via hardcoded credentials in .env.
directory_structure: src/app/ - Next.js App Router pages and API routes. src/lib/ - Supabase client and utilities. src/components/ - Reusable React components. public/ - Static assets.
